creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
> # ls -l /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pupp.rb
> ls: /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pupp.rb: No such file or directory

This was a typo :) But it's really not there:

# ls -l /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb
ls: /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb: No such file or directory
